快速.副标题: Enter parameters to calculate the quantum overlap between two people
快速.重叠描述: Total quantum overlap between Person A and Person B

精确.副标题: Enter detailed parameters to get precise quantum overlap results
精确.重叠百分比描述: Percentage of quantum from Person B in Person A

错误.计算失败: Calculation failed. Please check your input parameters.

反馈页面.提交成功: Feedback submitted successfully! Thank you for your support.

项目介绍.第一段: The Quantum Overlap Calculation Tool is an application for calculating the quantum overlap between two people.
项目介绍.第二段: Quantum overlap refers to the number of quantum from Person B present in Person A.
项目介绍.第三段: Our core goal is to demonstrate the quantum overlap between humans and nature, recognize the integration of humans and nature, achieve harmonious coexistence between humans and nature, and ultimately eliminate extreme inequality, class, and achieve peace.
项目介绍.第四段: The application provides two calculation modes: Quick Calculation Version and Precise Calculation Version (subscription).

开源协议.第一段: This project adopts the MIT open source license.
开源协议.第二段: The MIT License is a permissive open source license that allows you to freely use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute, sublicense, and sell copies of the software.
开源协议.第三段: Simply include the copyright notice and license notice in the software and all copies of the software.

量子重叠.描述: The number of quantum from Person B present in Person A.

量子交换.描述: The process of quantum transmission between humans through various means.

直接量子交换量.描述: The number of quantum from Person A that directly flows into Person B, based on thermal motion and speed.

间接量子交换量.描述: The number of quantum from Person A that flows into Person B through other intermediates, based on air currents and other moving objects.

跃迁量子交换量.描述: The number of quantum from Person A that flows into Person B through quantum transition, which is the transmission amount of sub-light speed quantum.

量子扩散抵达率.描述: A distance-related parameter or function that refers to the probability/proportion of quantum from A that diffuses into the environment and reaches B's body.

引言.内容: Welcome to the Quantum Overlap Calculation Tool. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information.

收集信息.内容: When you use our application, we may collect the following information:

项目.个人数据: Personal data you provide, such as name and email address (only when voluntarily provided)
项目.计算参数: Calculation parameters you input, such as location coordinates, weight, height, date of birth, etc.
项目.设备信息: Device information, such as device model, operating system version, etc.
项目.使用数据: Usage data, such as application usage frequency, visited pages, etc.

使用信息.内容: The information we collect is mainly used for:

项目.提供服务: Providing, maintaining, and improving our services
项目.优化体验: Analyzing application usage to optimize user experience

信息共享.内容: We will not sell or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share your information in the following cases:

项目.法律法规: Complying with legal and regulatory requirements
项目.保护权益: Protecting our rights, property, or safety
项目.服务提供商: Sharing with our service providers to assist us in providing services

数据安全.内容: We take reasonable security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, use, or disclosure. However, please note that no security measure is absolutely safe, and we cannot guarantee the absolute security of your information.

数据保留.内容: We will retain your personal information for as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with legal and regulatory requirements. When the information is no longer needed, we will securely delete or anonymize it.

用户权利.内容: Under applicable law, you may have the right to:

项目.访问更正删除: Access, correct, or delete your personal information
项目.限制反对: Restrict or object to our use of your personal information

政策变更.内容: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. When we make significant changes, we will notify you through in-app notifications or other means.

联系我们.内容: If you have any questions or concerns about this privacy policy, please contact us through the following methods:

功能.详细计算: More detailed quantum overlap calculation results
功能.分类展示: Display of quantum diffusion arrival rates by category
功能.数量百分比: Display of quantum overlap amount and percentage
